title: HopperGolem (NLAM)
description: Build an iron farm without wrangling villagers.
body:
![Hopper Golem - Farm Iron without Villagers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0835c47bd76528872bddf977b54474eecc5d3fe.png)
No longer actively maintained.
# Purpose
Iron farms are a common early game build, but wrangling villagers is annoying, and some players prefer not continuously instilling fear in villagers. This pack allows for creating golems that lay 'eggs' of iron.

# Directions for Use
1. Install this datapack.
2. Build a structure like an iron golem, replacing the iron blocks with hoppers.
3. Ensure the carved pumpkin is the last block placed.

# Notes
The 'eggs' are dropped every 35 seconds (the spawn frequency of a single cell fear-based iron farm).

# Known Issues
- Golems can currently be stacked in a small space and unbalance iron substantially.
- **☑** (1.21.1) ~~Trident marker is atrocious.~~ Hopper golems are now marked by a hopper over their head. An amusing side effect of the method of attaching the hopper is that killing a hopper golem may spawn a chicken.
# Support and Links
## Bug Reporting and Update Notifications
To report bugs and to keep up to date with new versions and additional packs from me, please join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/bK92yTbxj3).

## Links
Check out my other packs on [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/user/Artecie).

Help support ongoing development at [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/artecie) or [Ko-Fi](https://ko-fi.com/artecie).

Watch development (generally troubleshooting) and gameplay with the packs in use on my [Twitch Channel](https://twitch.tv/artecie).
